title: Crumbly Spicy Caramel Stir-fry
description: A comforting French dish featuring a mix of spices and caramel sauce that is perfect for adding to your dinner menu.

ingredients.name: pork tenderloin
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: caramel sauce base
ingredients.notes: pre-made or homemade, low-sugar variety if needed

ingredients.name: jalapeno peppers
ingredients.notes: sliced thinly for added heat and crunch

ingredients.name: fresh thyme sprigs
ingredients.notes: for adding a subtle flavor and aroma to the dish

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: to cook with, for richness and flavor

instructions: Trim the pork tenderloin into bite-sized pieces.
Season the pork with salt to taste.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add unsalted butter until melted and foaming begins.
Add sliced jalapeno peppers and cook for about 1 minute, stirring occasionally.
Add the seasoned pork pieces to the pan and cook until browned on all sides, approximately 5-7 minutes.
Pour in the caramel sauce base. Stir well to combine with the ingredients.
Lower heat to medium-low, cover the pan with a lid, and let it simmer for about 10 minutes.
After 10 minutes, remove from heat, garnish with celery leaves and thyme sprigs if desired, serve hot.
